title: The Polar Bear Prince
original_title: Kvitebjørn – Østenfor sol og vestenfor måne
overview: An adventurous girl, Liv, lives with her beloved grandfather in a small village nestled among majestic mountains and forests. One day she encounters a polar bear, who turns out to be a prince enchanted into animal form. To break the spell, they will have to face an evil witch.
